content.p: Amounts are available from the Airport and Airway Trust Fund established under section 9502 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 (26 U.S.C. 9502) to carry out section 44510 11 See References in Text note below. of this title. The amounts remain available until expended.

html:tr.style: font-size:6pt; border-bottom:1px solid black; border-top:1px solid black; -uslm-lc:h1;

html:th.style: min-width: 44.0pt; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle; border-right:1px solid black;
width:68.0pt ; max-width:68.0pt; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle; border-right:1px solid black; border-left:1px solid black;
width:94.0pt ; max-width:94.0pt; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle; border-left:1px solid black;

html:td.style: text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; border-left:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt; padding-left: 2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid black; padding-left: 2pt;
html:td.html:p: Nov. 5, 1990, Pub. L. 101–516, (2d sentence in par. under heading “Facilities and Equipment”), 104 Stat. 2160.

html:td.style: text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; border-left:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt; padding-left: 2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid black; padding-left: 2pt;
html:td.html:p: Oct. 28, 1991, Pub. L. 102–143, (2d sentence in par. under heading “Facilities and Equipment”), 105 Stat. 922.

html:td.style: text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; border-left:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt; padding-left: 2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid black; padding-left: 2pt;
html:td.html:p: Oct. 6, 1992, Pub. L. 102–388, (2d sentence in par. under heading “Facilities and Equipment”), 106 Stat. 1526.

note.p: This section is substituted for the source provisions for clarity and because of the restatement.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: Section 44510 of this title, referred to in text, was repealed by Pub. L. 118–63, title IV, § 401(a), May 16, 2024, 138 Stat. 1148.
